---
title: "Lecture Notes"
---

::: {.lecture-list}
### Introduction {.unnumbered}
 Lecture 01: Introduction to Robot Learning<br>

### Movement Primitives {.unnumbered}
[Lecture 02: Dynamic Movement Primitives](02-dynamic-movement-primitives.qmd)<br>
Lecture 03: Learning Stable Dynamical Systems<br>

### Latent Variable Models {.unnumbered}
Lecture 04: Autoencoders<br>
Lecture 05: Variational Autoencoders<br>
Lecture 06: Geometric Autoencoders<br>

### Generative Models for Robot Learning {.unnumbered}
Lecture 07: Brownian Motion and Wiener Process<br>
Lecture 08: Stochastic Differential Equations<br>
Lecture 09: Score-Based Generative Models<br>
Lecture 10: Diffusion Models and Diffusion Policy<br>
Lecture 11: Neural ODEs<br>
Lecture 12: Flow Matching for Robot Policy Learning<br>

### Optimal Control and Reinforcement Learning {.unnumbered}
Lecture 13: Continuous-Time Optimal Control<br>
Lecture 14: Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman Equations<br>
Lecture 15: Discrete-Time Reinforcement Learning Foundations<br>
Lecture 16: Policy Gradient Fundamentals<br>
Lecture 17: REINFORCE and Variance Reduction<br>
Lecture 18: Actor--Critic and Advanced Policy Optimization<br>
Lecture 19: Reinforcement Learning for Robot Control<br>

### Foundation Models for Robotics {.unnumbered}
Lecture 20: Vision-Language-Action Models, World Models, and Robot Foundation Models<br>
:::
